items.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Jeppesen ForeFlight/
items.description: The original innovators of aviation technology are back in a big way. Today, Jeppesen ForeFlight announced its launch as a new digital aviation entity, backed by Thoma Bravo, a leading software investment firm. The company has completed its separation from Boeing and sale to Thoma Bravo in an all-cash transaction valued at $10.55 billion. Brad Surak, who previously led the Digital Aviation Solutions business at Boeing, will lead Jeppesen ForeFlight as Chief Executive Officer.

items.title: Ryanair Holdings PLC (RYAAY) Half Year 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Profit Growth and ...
items.description: Ryanair Holdings PLC (RYAAY) reports a 20% profit increase, strategic fuel hedging, and anticipates robust passenger growth despite challenges in the European market.

items.title: Ryanair Surges Past Forecasts as Boeing Delivers Early--But O'Leary Threatens UK Exit
items.description: Passenger growth tops targets, profits soar, and a UK tax hike could send planes to Italy instead.

items.title: Amazon’s OpenAI Deal Is Boosting AI Stocks. The Rest of the Market Is Struggling.
items.description: Stocks linked to the artificial intelligence rally were pretty much the only winners during Monday’s session. The Dow fell 410 points, or 0.9%. The S&P 500 was down 0.2%, but only 67 of its members were rising.
